acceptance_targets: [chapter_01_craft_01] Pass if the revised passages beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:57, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:61, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:205 do not spend more than two consecutive sentences on free-standing general explanation before a new action, obstacle, or consequence occurs on the page; fail if those passages still read as detached briefing blocks.

[chapter_01_dialogue_01] Pass if the revised exchange beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:79 includes at least one plainspoken reference to the pool-memory and one plainspoken reference to the old scar or surgery, and the phrase 'juvenile aquatic incident' is gone from the passage anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:95; fail if Mira's side of the call still stays entirely in claims-code abstractions.

[chapter_01_prose_01] Pass if, when reading the revised paragraphs anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:113, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:137, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:183, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:261, at least three now end on concrete action, sensation, or interiority rather than a generalized statement about the city, the company, or the building; fail if three or more of those paragraphs still resolve into institutional aphorism.
[fallback_full_booker_contract] At least 1 full-book actionable finding cites snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1 and includes measurable acceptance criteria.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passages beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:57, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:61, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:205 do not spend more than two consecutive sentences on free-standing general explanation before a new action, obstacle, or consequence occurs on the page; fail if those passages still read as detached briefing blocks.
findings.problem: Scene pressure repeatedly pauses for generalized system briefings just after the chapter has already established the machinery in action. The proxy-file reset and the hold-room reset both step out of live conflict to explain what proxy work or cheap stock 'always' means, which loosens the Friday-clock vice instead of tightening it through the present obstacle.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the explanatory passages beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:57, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:61, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:205 so each piece of world knowledge is attached to an immediate action, interruption, or decision already happening on the page. Fold the proxy-work judgment into Mira's reading of specific file fields during the call setup, and fold the bargain-line history into what the scan is proving right now instead of pausing for a mini-essay.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised exchange beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:79 includes at least one plainspoken reference to the pool-memory and one plainspoken reference to the old scar or surgery, and the phrase 'juvenile aquatic incident' is gone from the passage anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:95; fail if Mira's side of the call still stays entirely in claims-code abstractions.
findings.problem: Mira's pressure voice in the proxy call drifts from dry, exact worker-speech into bureaucratic code that sounds closer to company procedure than to her own idiolect. Phrases like 'juvenile aquatic incident' and the stacked claims abstractions keep her competent, but they also over-formalize a live argument and narrow the register difference between Mira and Celia.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise Mira's lines at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:79, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:89, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:95, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:101 so she still sounds professionally trained but shifts into plainer, more pressured speech once the assistant resists. Replace the most memo-like abstractions with concrete nouns the scene has already earned: scar, old surgery, child, pool, drowning, memory.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, when reading the revised paragraphs anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:113, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:137, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:183, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:261, at least three now end on concrete action, sensation, or interiority rather than a generalized statement about the city, the company, or the building; fail if three or more of those paragraphs still resolve into institutional aphorism.
findings.problem: The chapter leans on the same prose move more than twice: after a vivid concrete beat, the paragraph caps itself with an aphoristic institutional-summary sentence about the city, the company, or the building. The individual lines are competent, but the recurrence becomes a tic and starts flattening surprise into thesis.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:113, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:137, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:183, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:261, replace at least three of the generalized cappers with scene-specific aftermath: a physical action, sensory residue, or a character-specific interior beat that only this moment can produce. Keep at most one institutional thesis landing across these cited paragraphs.

findings.acceptance_test: At least 1 full-book actionable finding cites snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1 and includes measurable acceptance criteria.
findings.problem: Full-book review contract could not be validated; shortlist assessment is incomplete. Root validator reason: reviews/cycle_02/full_booker.review.json is logically inconsistent: verdict PASS but findings are present
findings.rewrite_direction: Regenerate full-book findings with anchored references in snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1-400.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into biotech grime, erotic awkwardness, debt language, bureaucratic absurdity, and the tenderness of people maintaining one another under bad systems. When choosing between an elegant abstraction and an ugly specific detail, choose the specific detail unless omission itself heightens pressure.
aesthetic_risk_policy.edge_case_resolution: Use restraint only when aftermath, gesture, residue, or changed behavior keeps the full pressure visible. Do not convert morally compromising acts into self-exonerating reflection, and do not flatten exploitative sex, poverty, or violence into generic dystopian mood.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches injury, sex, class shame, or institutional cruelty and the language retreats into tasteful fog, rewrite until the bodily fact, immediate sensation, and social consequence are fully legible on the page.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the norm in spoken English here; uncontracted forms are reserved for legal testimony, managerial performance, deliberate emphasis, or characters whose formality is itself a tactic.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate inspection-room procedural chapters with crowded comic clinic scenes, quiet domestic intervals, erotic pressure, warehouse horror, and civic hearing sequences; consecutive chapters should differ in scene density, dialogue load, and emotional temperature so the book keeps changing how it moves.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, urban, bodily, and unsentimental; technical vocabulary is welcome when embedded in action and cost, not as decorative futurism.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: tight third-person close anchored to Mira Alves; the narration can infer social systems through what she notices, but it should not become omniscient exposition.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate crisp claim-note precision with longer, salt-wet, bodily sentences when feeling, memory, or city pressure breaches Mira's control.
